name: Business Email Compromise Detection
description: Detects and responds to Business Email Compromise (BEC) attacks including CEO fraud, vendor impersonation, and display name spoofing. AI analysis focuses on sender impersonation patterns, domain lookalikes, and urgency-based social engineering. Confirmed BEC attempts trigger email quarantine, executive protection team notification via Slack, and automatic Jira incident ticket creation for tracking and compliance.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tracking ticket for BEC investigation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify executive protection team of confirmed BEC attempt

data.title: BEC / Phishing Alert
data.summary: Triggers on BEC, impersonation, or phishing alerts

data.title: AI BEC Analysis
data.summary: Analyze for sender impersonation, display name spoofing, domain lookalikes

config.custom_instructions: Focus on sender impersonation, display name spoofing, domain lookalikes, urgency language, wire transfer requests, and invoice fraud patterns

data.title: BEC Confirmed?
data.summary: Is this a confirmed Business Email Compromise attempt?

data.title: Quarantine Email
data.summary: Remove the BEC email from all recipient mailboxes

data.title: Notify Executive Protection
data.summary: Alert the executive protection team via Slack

data.title: Create Incident Ticket
data.summary: Create Jira ticket to track the BEC investigation

config.title: BEC Attack — {{$.trigger.alert.impersonated_identity}} impersonation targeting {{$.trigger.alert.recipient}}

data.title: Flag for Review
data.summary: Add analyst note for manual review of suspicious email

data.title: End — BEC Contained
data.summary: BEC quarantined, team notified, ticket created

config.summary: BEC attack confirmed and contained. Email quarantined, executive protection notified, incident ticket created.

data.title: End — Flagged for Review
data.summary: Not confirmed BEC, flagged for analyst review

config.summary: Email not confirmed as BEC by AI analysis. Flagged for manual analyst review.
